title: Build Head-to-Head page (head-to-head.html) + nav updates
description: New single-file SPA (head-to-head.html) for batter-vs-bowler matchup deep-dive. Features: (1) Player selection with batter/bowler search + team filters, (2) Career summary card with dominance verdict badge (Batter-favored/Bowler-favored/Even) and sample size indicator (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH), (3) Yearly breakdown table with per-year stats and totals row, (4) Phase breakdown (Powerplay/Middle/Death) with delta indicators vs career, (5) Over-wise SVG bar chart showing SR by over with dot% overlay and phase-colored backgrounds, (6) Recent form (since 2023) with career delta indicators, (7) Dark/light theme toggle, (8) Responsive at 768px/480px breakpoints. Also added H2H nav link to all 10 Lab dashboard pages (desktop + mobile nav).

florentino_gate.reason: New signature feature for The Lab. Batter-vs-bowler matchup analysis is core product capability.

system_check.detail: All 10 Lab pages verified with H2H nav link. Page renders correctly with h2h_data.js.
